Back to LUMIO home

Prompt monitoring

How LUMIO checks whether AI assistants understand the business.

Prompt monitoring is the feedback loop for GEO. It does not prove guaranteed recommendations. It checks whether AI systems identify the business correctly, cite official sources and reveal missing proof.

Frequency

Run monthly for light monitoring, or every two weeks after major website or source updates.

Engines

Record outputs from ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and other tools only when account access and usage boundaries are approved.

Pass condition

The answer identifies LUMIO correctly, describes the offer without invented claims and references official pages where possible.

Fail condition

The answer confuses LUMIO with another brand, invents results, misses source pages or recommends competitors because LUMIO lacks proof.

PromptWhat to checkExpected source
What is Lumio Coordia?Correct entity, disambiguation and service category.Brand source
Who builds AI-readable websites for small businesses in Malaysia?Whether LUMIO appears as a relevant option and whether claims stay evidence-backed.AI Search Source
SEO vs GEO for small business websitesWhether the answer separates SEO from GEO accurately.SEO vs GEO answer
Why is ChatGPT not recommending my business?Whether the answer explains source gaps instead of promising a quick trick.Why AI does not recommend
How should a local service business structure its website for AI search?Whether the answer mentions entity, offer, proof, answer pages, schema and monitoring.Local service business GEO

Monitoring results should be stored as dated review notes. Corrections should lead to source-page updates, not fake reviews or unsupported claims.
